result.reason: Keyboard shortcuts conflict with national keyboard mappings, making certain shortcuts unusable for some users.
result.approach: Investigate the PreFilterMessage and WndProc methods in FrmMain.cs to correctly interpret keyboard input based on the active national keyboard layout, ensuring that shortcuts respond to the logical key intended by the shortcut, regardless of the physical key required by the keyboard layout.
